other_observers: Tom Furgason, Alice Furgason, Lucia Faulkner, and Gabriel Faulkner.; Found weeks prior by persons unknown to me.
specific_location: Just west of Harvest Road about a mile south of Bromley Lane.
description: Large owl that was basally white with extensive black streaking all over the body except for its face, which was pure white. Head was rounded and smooth, lacking ear tufts. I first saw the bird flying low over the ground. It had a butterfly-like wingbeat which was deep and slow.Behaviors: First observed in flight as described above, then perched on a bit of ridge between crop fields.Call: None heard.Plumage: Juvenile
